notes: v0.0.3 final. Real measurements now wired into native `qualia-cli bench --suite full` (no more fully static JSON for Qualia timings). Playground has inline SHACL compiler + 6-modality interactive demos. Full docs refresh. See RELEASE_NOTES_v0.0.3.md. Includes Windows + Android direct downloads. macOS (darwin) and Linux binaries (CLI + full desktop bundles) are built automatically by the release workflow (.github/workflows/release.yml) when a v* tag is pushed — they appear as assets in the GitHub Release.
